# Objectives

1. To clearly understand and document all digital requirements of the LED driver system.
2. To study the LED1642GW device as a reference for architecture and behaviour.
3. To analyse the limitations and constraints of the SG13G2 process technology.
4. To develop a behavioural model using Matlab/Simulink and HDL Coder.
5. To design the digital micro-architecture in SystemVerilog following proper coding guidelines.
6. To build a verification setup using cocotb and test the design on a GateMate FPGA.
7. To document the complete thesis using Quarto that explains the design, methodology, and results.
